ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Central Bank of India announced the promotion of two senior management personnel, effective July 1, 2026, as a routine disclosure under SEBI regulations. Shri Mohit Kodnani has been elevated to Chief General Manager - DIT, and Shri Raj Kishor Singh to General Manager, reflecting internal career progression within the bank's leadership. This document indicates normal operational changes and presents no immediate red flags regarding the bank's stability or management continuity.
